title: Data Processor Agreement — PeopleSync HR Vendor
body:
**DATA PROCESSOR AGREEMENT**

**Parties:** TechCorp ("Data Controller") and PeopleSync Inc. ("Data Processor")

**Effective Date:** March 1, 2026

**1. SCOPE AND PURPOSE**

This Data Processor Agreement ("DPA") supplements the Service Agreement between TechCorp and PeopleSync and governs the processing of personal data on TechCorp's behalf in connection with PeopleSync's provision of HR and payroll administration services. The Data Processor shall process personal data only as instructed by the Data Controller and solely for the purposes specified herein. Processing duration shall extend for the term of the underlying Service Agreement plus 30 days post-termination to facilitate data deletion or return.

**2. CATEGORIES OF PERSONAL DATA PROCESSED**

Under this Agreement, the Data Processor shall process the following categories of employee personal data:

• Employee names and identification information
• Business email addresses
• Job titles and role classifications
• Organizational department and reporting structure
• Employment start dates and status
• Compensation and benefits information (processing only as necessary for administration)

The Data Processor acknowledges that it shall NOT process special categories of personal data (as defined under GDPR Article 9) unless explicitly authorized in writing by the Data Controller. No sensitive health information, biometric data, union membership, or criminal records shall be transmitted to PeopleSync without prior written consent.

**3. DATA PROCESSOR OBLIGATIONS**

PeopleSync covenants that it shall:

(a) Process personal data only in accordance with documented instructions from TechCorp and applicable Data Protection Laws, including the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and any applicable state-level privacy regulations;

(b) Ensure that personnel authorized to process personal data are subject to binding confidentiality obligations covering all personal data accessed during performance of services;
